title: SEC1: wasm-pack build not scripted or pinned anywhere
description: The only documentation for building the WASM crate is an HTML comment in wasm/web/index.html line 5: 'wasm-pack build --target web wasm/'. There is no Makefile, justfile, shell script, or entry in CLAUDE.md. wasm-pack version is unpinned — a new wasm-pack version that generates incompatible JS bindings will silently produce a broken pkg/ directory. The quality gates in CLAUDE.md (cargo fmt, clippy, cargo test) do not cover wasm-pack build. Fix: add a build script at wasm/build.sh, pin wasm-pack version, and add 'wasm-pack build' to the quality gate list in CLAUDE.md.
